advanced.title: Advanced Present Simple and Continuous
advanced.content:
📌 Advanced Present Simple
  • Narrative present: Dùng để kể chuyện, truyện cười nhằm tăng tính sống động.
    So I walk into the office and everyone looks at me.
  • Live commentaries: Tường thuật trực tiếp (thể thao, nấu ăn).
    Watkins controls the ball and shoots!
  • Performative verbs: Động từ thực hiện hành động ngay khi nói (admit, apologize, deny, guarantee, promise, suggest).
    I promise I'll be there.
  • Headlines & Summaries: Tiêu đề báo chí hoặc tóm tắt cốt truyện.
    Minister resigns after scandal.
  • Reporting verbs: Dùng với say, tell, hear để báo cáo thông tin.
    I hear you're moving to London.
📌 Advanced Present Continuous
  • Stative verbs (Temporary): Dùng với động từ trạng thái để nhấn mạnh tính tạm thời.
    I'm loving the new project (at the moment).
  • Mental-state verbs: find, realise, regret, think (diễn tả sự bắt đầu nhận thức).
    I'm realising how hard this is.
  • Politeness: hope, wonder (làm yêu cầu nhẹ nhàng hơn).
    I'm hoping you can help me.
  • Annoying habits: always, constantly, forever + V-ing.
    You're always leaving the door open!

exercises.q: I ___ you're thinking of leaving the company. Is that true?
exercises.exp: Reporting verb 'hear' dùng ở hiện tại đơn để báo cáo thông tin nhận được.

exercises.q: The Prime Minister ___ the new hospital tomorrow morning.
exercises.exp: Cả hiện tại đơn (lịch trình) và hiện tại tiếp diễn (sắp xếp) đều dùng được cho tương lai.

exercises.q: I ___ if you could spare a few minutes to discuss the proposal.
exercises.exp: Hiện tại tiếp diễn (am wondering) giúp câu hỏi trở nên lịch sự và nhẹ nhàng hơn.

exercises.q: You ___ your keys! It's so frustrating.
exercises.opts: always lose,are always losing,always lost,have always lost
exercises.exp: Always + V-ing diễn tả một thói quen gây khó chịu.

exercises.q: So I ___ into the room, and there he is, sitting in my chair!
exercises.exp: Narrative present (hiện tại kể chuyện) dùng để làm câu chuyện sống động hơn.

exercises.q: I ___ that we should postpone the meeting until next week.
exercises.exp: Suggest là một performative verb, thường dùng ở hiện tại đơn.

exercises.q: Scientists ___ a new planet in a distant galaxy.
exercises.exp: Tiêu đề báo chí thường dùng hiện tại đơn cho các sự kiện vừa xảy ra.

exercises.q: I ___ how much effort you've put into this project.
exercises.exp: Am realising diễn tả một nhận thức vừa mới bắt đầu hình thành.

exercises.q: You ___ very patient with the children today.
exercises.exp: Are being nhấn mạnh một hành vi tạm thời, khác với tính cách thông thường.

exercises.q: The soup ___ delicious. What's in it?
exercises.exp: Taste (có vị) là động từ trạng thái, không dùng tiếp diễn.

exercises.q: I ___ to get some advice on my career path.
exercises.exp: Am hoping làm cho yêu cầu trở nên nhẹ nhàng, lịch sự hơn.

exercises.q: He ___ about his problems. It's getting on my nerves.
exercises.exp: Forever + V-ing diễn tả thói quen gây khó chịu.

exercises.q: I ___ why they haven't called us back yet.
exercises.exp: Doubt là động từ trạng thái, hiếm khi dùng ở dạng tiếp diễn.

exercises.q: The chef ___ the sauce to see if it needs more salt.
exercises.exp: Ở đây taste là hành động (nếm), có thể dùng tiếp diễn.

exercises.q: I ___ that I was wrong about the initial estimates.
At 8:00, I ___ usually driving to work.
exercises.exp: Diễn tả một hành động đang diễn ra tại một thời điểm cụ thể trong lịch trình hàng ngày.

exercises.q: I ___ that we should focus on the marketing strategy first.
exercises.exp: Feel (có ý kiến) là động từ trạng thái.

exercises.q: They ___ that the road will be closed for three days.
exercises.exp: Reporting verb 'say' dùng ở hiện tại đơn.

exercises.q: The company ___ to expand into the Asian market.
exercises.exp: Cả hai đều dùng được để nói về kế hoạch tương lai.

exercises.q: I ___ why you're being so difficult today.
exercises.opts: don't understand,am not understanding,didn't understand,haven't understood
exercises.exp: Understand là động từ trạng thái.

exercises.q: I ___ (wonder) if you could help me with this task.
She ___ (constantly/complain) about the weather.
I ___ (hear) you've been promoted. Congratulations!
The chef ___ (taste) the soup right now.
I ___ (realise) now that I made a mistake.
He ___ (always/lose) his keys when he's in a hurry.
I ___ (promise) to finish the report by tomorrow.
The sun ___ (rise) in the east.
I ___ (hope) you can join us for dinner.
Why ___ you ___ (be) so rude today?
I ___ (not/deny) that there are some problems.
They ___ (say) it's going to be a cold winter.
I ___ (think) of moving to a new city.
The plane ___ (take) off at 10 PM.
I ___ (regret) to inform you that your application was unsuccessful.
She ___ (forever/talk) about her cats.
I ___ (feel) much better now, thank you.
The news report ___ (state) that the economy is growing.
I ___ (wonder) whether we should invite him.
He ___ (refuse) to accept the terms of the contract.

reorder.words: I am wondering if you could help me
he is always leaving his dirty dishes here
I hear that you are moving to Paris
she is being very patient with the kids
I promise that I will not be late
the chef is tasting the sauce for salt
I am realising how difficult this task is
they say that the weather will be fine
you are constantly interrupting me during meetings
I am hoping to see you soon again
the train leaves at exactly nine o'clock
I am thinking of buying a new car
he will leave everything until the last minute
I suggest that we start the meeting now
she is forever complaining about her job
I hear you are starting a new project
it is time that we left the party
I am wondering whether you have the time
he is being unusually quiet this morning
I admit that I made a mistake

passage.text: Dear Sarah, I {{1}} to write to you for ages. I {{2}} how busy you must be with the new job. Everyone {{3}} that you're doing a great job. I {{4}} that you're enjoying the challenge. Lately, I {{5}} how much I miss our chats. I {{6}} of visiting you next month. My train {{7}} at 10 AM on Friday. I {{8}} if you could pick me up. I {{9}} that it might be a lot to ask. Anyway, I {{10}} for a positive reply.

The match {{1}} now. The referee {{2}} the whistle. Smith {{3}} the ball to Jones. Jones {{4}} it beautifully and {{5}} towards the goal. He {{6}}! The crowd {{7}} wild. This {{8}} a historic moment. The commentator {{9}} that this is the best game ever. We {{10}} a great time here.

So I {{1}} into the shop and I {{2}} this amazing dress. I {{3}} it on and it {{4}} perfectly. Suddenly, the manager {{5}} up to me. He {{6}} that the shop is closing. I {{7}} him that I just need a minute. He {{8}} to wait. I {{9}} that I was a bit annoyed. I {{10}} never going back there again.

The government {{1}} a new law today. The Prime Minister {{2}} a speech at noon. Critics {{3}} that it won't work. However, supporters {{4}} that it's necessary. I {{5}} that the situation is complex. People {{6}} constantly about the changes. I {{7}} if there's a better way. We {{8}} currently for more data. The report {{9}} that the impact will be positive. I {{10}} to see the results soon.

I {{1}} my coffee when the phone {{2}}. It's my boss. He {{3}} that I need to come in. I {{4}} him that I'm on holiday. He {{5}} always calling me at the wrong time! I {{6}} to lose my patience. I {{7}} if I should quit. My friend {{8}} me that I should wait. I {{9}} his advice for now. I {{10}} to have a peaceful day.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết một đoạn văn về trải nghiệm của bạn liên quan đến Advanced Present Simple and Continuous. Sử dụng ít nhất 5 cấu trúc đã học.
writing_prompts.example: I have been studying this particular grammar point for quite some time now, and I find it incredibly useful for expressing complex ideas in professional settings. It allows me to convey nuances that simpler structures cannot capture effectively, which is essential for C1 level proficiency.

advanced.title: Advanced Past Tenses
advanced.content:
📌 Advanced Past Simple
  • Politeness: Dùng để làm yêu cầu/câu hỏi bớt trực diện.
    I wanted to ask if you were free.
  • Unreal Meaning: Dùng sau I wish, I'd rather, It's time, as if để nói về hiện tại giả định.
    It's time we left.
📌 Advanced Past Continuous
  • Irritation: Thói quen gây khó chịu trong quá khứ (always, constantly).
    He was always interrupting me!
  • Temporary Period: Nhấn mạnh hành động lặp lại trong một khoảng thời gian tạm thời.
    During that week, I was studying late every night.
  • Tentativeness: Rất lịch sự khi đưa ra yêu cầu.
    I was wondering if you could help me.
📌 Advanced Past Perfect
  • Unmet expectations: Hy vọng/mong đợi không thành (hope, expect, think).
    I had hoped you would call.
  • Deduction/Speculation: Suy luận về điều đã xảy ra trước một thời điểm quá khứ.
    He had obviously forgotten.
  • Cause of state: Giải thích nguyên nhân cho một trạng thái trong quá khứ.
    She was tired because she had been working all day.

exercises.q: I ___ if you could help me with the luggage.
exercises.exp: Past continuous (was wondering) dùng để đưa ra yêu cầu một cách rất lịch sự và tế nhị.

exercises.q: It's high time we ___ home; it's getting very late.
exercises.exp: Cấu trúc 'It's time + S + V2/ed' dùng để diễn tả việc lẽ ra đã phải làm.

exercises.q: He ___ his dirty socks on the floor, which drove me crazy.
exercises.opts: always left,was always leaving,had always left,always leaves
exercises.exp: Past continuous + always diễn tả thói quen gây khó chịu trong quá khứ.

exercises.q: I ___ that you would be able to join us for dinner.
exercises.exp: Past perfect (had hoped) diễn tả một hy vọng trong quá khứ nhưng không thành hiện thực.

exercises.q: She was exhausted because she ___ for over ten hours.
exercises.opts: worked,was working,had been working,has been working
exercises.exp: Past perfect continuous diễn tả nguyên nhân kéo dài dẫn đến một trạng thái trong quá khứ.

exercises.q: I ___ to speak with the manager, if he's available.
exercises.exp: Past simple (wanted) dùng để làm câu hỏi bớt trực diện và lịch sự hơn.

exercises.q: He looked as if he ___ a ghost.
exercises.exp: As if + Past perfect diễn tả một giả định không có thật trong quá khứ.

exercises.q: During my stay in Paris, I ___ the Louvre every morning.
exercises.exp: Past continuous nhấn mạnh hành động lặp lại trong một khoảng thời gian tạm thời.

exercises.q: By the time we arrived, the meeting ___.
exercises.exp: Hành động xảy ra trước một thời điểm trong quá khứ dùng Past perfect.

exercises.q: I wish I ___ the answer to that question yesterday.
exercises.exp: Wish + Past perfect diễn tả sự hối tiếc về một việc trong quá khứ.

exercises.q: They ___ for hours when they finally found the trail.
exercises.opts: walked,were walking,had been walking,have been walking
exercises.exp: Nhấn mạnh quá trình kéo dài trước một hành động khác trong quá khứ.

exercises.q: I ___ to tell you earlier, but I forgot.
exercises.exp: Past simple cho ý định trong quá khứ.

exercises.q: She ___ constantly about her boss back then.
exercises.exp: Thói quen gây khó chịu trong quá khứ.

exercises.q: I ___ that we had already settled this matter.
The room was messy; the children ___ there all afternoon.
exercises.exp: Deduction based on evidence in the past.

exercises.q: I'd rather you ___ so much noise last night.
exercises.exp: Would rather + S + Past perfect cho sự hối tiếc về quá khứ.

exercises.q: He ___ to be the winner, but he came in second.
We ___ if you might have a spare room for the night.
She ___ all day, so she was ready for a break.
exercises.opts: studied,was studying,had been studying,has been studying

exercises.q: I ___ that you were coming today!
I ___ (wonder) if you could lend me your car for the weekend.
It's time the children ___ (be) in bed.
She ___ (always/interrupt) me when I was trying to speak.
I ___ (had/hope) for a better result, but I'm satisfied.
He was out of breath because he ___ (run).
I ___ (want) to ask you about your plans for the summer.
I wish I ___ (not/say) that to her yesterday.
They ___ (constantly/argue) during the entire trip.
By the time I got there, they ___ (already/leave).
exercises.exp: Past action before another past action.

exercises.q: He talked as if he ___ (know) everything about the subject.
During that month, we ___ (visit) our grandparents every day.
I ___ (expect) the movie to be better, to be honest.
She was red in the face because she ___ (cry).
I ___ (think) we were supposed to meet at 5:00?
I'd rather you ___ (not/tell) him the truth yet.
They ___ (work) on the project for months before it was cancelled.
I ___ (wonder) whether you had seen my glasses.
He ___ (forever/forget) his umbrella in the office.
The ground was wet because it ___ (rain) all night.
I ___ (hope) you could give me some advice.

reorder.words: I was wondering if you could help me
he was always leaving his dirty socks there
I had hoped that you would call me
it is time that we went home now
she had been working all day and was tired
I wanted to ask you a quick question
he looked as if he had seen a ghost
we were constantly arguing about the small things
I wish I had known the truth earlier
they were visiting her every day in hospital
I'd rather you had not told him yet
by the time we arrived the show had started
she was crying because she had lost her dog
I thought we agreed to meet on Tuesday
he was forever complaining about his low salary
we were hoping you might explain the plan
the room was silent because they had argued
I was wondering whether you were free tonight
it was time the children were in bed
I had expected the results to be better

passage.text: Last night {{1}} a disaster. I {{2}} for hours when the power went out. I {{3}} that I would finish the report. I {{4}} if you could give me an extension. I {{5}} to call you, but my phone {{6}} dead. I {{7}} so hard all week. I {{8}} exhausted. I wish I {{9}} more careful with my battery. It {{10}} time I bought a new laptop.

When I {{1}} him, he {{2}} very strange. He {{3}} as if he {{4}} something. I {{5}} if he was okay. He {{6}} always acting like that. I {{7}} that he would be more open. He {{8}} for a long time. His eyes {{9}} red. He {{10}} obviously been crying.

During my childhood, we {{1}} to the beach every summer. My brother {{2}} always teasing me. I {{3}} that he would stop. One day, I {{4}} enough. I {{5}} to tell my parents. They {{6}} already noticed his behavior. It {{7}} time he {{8}} a lesson. I wish I {{9}} more assertive back then. We {{10}} much happier now if I had been.

The office {{1}} quiet when I {{2}}. Everyone {{3}} home. I {{4}} that some people would still be there. I {{5}} if I could find the files. I {{6}} for them all morning. I {{7}} exhausted. I {{8}} as if I {{9}} a marathon. It {{10}} time I took a break.

She {{1}} me that she {{2}} the book. I {{3}} to borrow it. I {{4}} if she still had it. She {{5}} always losing things. I {{6}} that she would be more careful. She {{7}} for it for an hour. She {{8}} very frustrated. I wish I {{9}} her to keep it safe. It {{10}} time she got organized.

advanced.title: Advanced Modals: Will, Would, Should
advanced.content:
📌 Advanced Will
  • Habits/Typical behavior: Thói quen đặc trưng.
    He will sit there for hours doing nothing.
  • Assumptions: Giả định về hiện tại.
    That'll be the postman.
  • Deductions about past: Suy luận về quá khứ (will have + V3).
    He will have forgotten the meeting.
  • Criticism: Chỉ trích thói quen gây khó chịu.
    If you will eat so much chocolate, you can't complain about your weight.
📌 Advanced Would
  • Past habits: Thói quen trong quá khứ.
    My dad would always fall asleep on the sofa.
  • Past refusal: Từ chối trong quá khứ (wouldn't).
    The car wouldn't start this morning.
  • Tentative opinions: Ý kiến nhẹ nhàng, lịch sự.
    I would say that's a bit risky.
📌 Advanced Should
  • Probability/Expectation: Điều gì đó nên/sẽ xảy ra theo dự tính.
    They should be here by now.
  • Hypothetical (If): Dùng thay 'if' trong văn phong trang trọng.
    Should you need any help, let me know.
  • Subjunctive: Sau các động từ suggest, insist.
    I suggest that he should apologize.

exercises.q: That ___ be the pizza delivery guy. I ordered 20 minutes ago.
exercises.exp: Will dùng cho giả định về hiện tại (assumption).

exercises.q: If you ___ insist on being late, you'll lose your job.
exercises.exp: Will dùng để chỉ trích một thói quen cố chấp.

exercises.q: Every evening, my grandfather ___ sit by the fire and tell us stories.
exercises.exp: Would dùng cho thói quen đặc trưng trong quá khứ.

exercises.q: ___ you require any further assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us.
exercises.exp: Should đảo ngữ thay cho 'If' trong văn phong trang trọng.

exercises.q: He ___ the message by now; I sent it two hours ago.
exercises.opts: will have seen,would have seen,should have seen,must have seen
exercises.exp: Will have + V3 dùng cho suy luận về một việc chắc chắn đã xảy ra.

exercises.q: I tried to explain the situation, but she ___ listen.
exercises.exp: Wouldn't diễn tả sự từ chối trong quá khứ.

exercises.q: I ___ say that this is the best solution we have.
exercises.exp: Would làm cho ý kiến trở nên nhẹ nhàng, bớt khẳng định hơn.

exercises.q: The package ___ have arrived yesterday, but there was a delay.
exercises.exp: Should have + V3 diễn tả một việc lẽ ra phải xảy ra nhưng không.

exercises.q: Whenever I ask him for help, he ___ always find an excuse.
exercises.exp: Will diễn tả thói quen đặc trưng ở hiện tại.

exercises.q: I suggest that he ___ more careful in the future.
exercises.exp: Should dùng sau động từ gợi ý (subjunctive-like).

exercises.q: The car ___ start this morning, so I took the bus.
You ___ have told me you were coming! I haven't prepared anything.
That ___ be Mary on the phone. She said she'd call around this time.
In the old days, people ___ spend their evenings talking instead of watching TV.
I ___ imagine that he's quite upset about the news.
He ___ finished his homework by now; he's been at it for hours.
___ anything go wrong, call me immediately.
She ___ always leave her umbrella on the bus.
I ___ think that we need more time to decide.
He ___ be at home now; his car is in the driveway.
___ you see him, tell him I'm looking for him.
He ___ (always/interrupt) people when they are talking.
I ___ (say) that it's a bit too expensive.
The door ___ (not/open) no matter how hard I pushed.
By now, they ___ (arrive) at the hotel.
If you ___ (will/smoke) so much, you must expect to cough.
When we lived in the country, we ___ (go) for long walks.
That ___ (be) the postman at the door.
You ___ (tell) me you were struggling!
I suggest that she ___ (apply) for the job.
He ___ (sit) and stare out of the window for hours.
I ___ (imagine) it's quite difficult for them.
___ you change your mind, let us know.
My car ___ (not/start) this morning.
He ___ (forget) his keys again, I'm sure.
We ___ (expect) better results from the team.
She ___ (will/be) late, she always is.
I ___ (think) that's a great idea.
___ there be any problems, contact support.
He ___ (will/not/listen) to any advice.

reorder.words: that will be the postman at the door

passage.text: Every morning, my cat {{1}} sit by the window and watch the birds. If I {{2}} try to move her, she {{3}} hiss at me. I {{4}} say she's quite territorial. By now, she {{5}} caught a few flies. {{6}} you ever visit me, you {{7}} see her there. I {{8}} have bought a bigger window for her. That {{9}} be her now, scratching the glass. She {{10}} not stop until I open it.

In the past, people {{1}} spend hours writing letters. They {{2}} wait weeks for a reply. I {{3}} imagine it was very frustrating. {{4}} a letter get lost, they {{5}} have to write it again. My grandmother {{6}} tell me stories about it. She {{7}} have written hundreds of letters. I {{8}} say we are lucky today. {{9}} you need to talk to someone, you {{10}} just call them.

He {{1}} always leave his shoes in the hallway. I {{2}} have told him a thousand times. If he {{3}} be so messy, he {{4}} expect me to be angry. That {{5}} be him coming home now. He {{6}} have forgotten his keys again. {{7}} he ring the bell, I {{8}} not answer. I {{9}} say he needs to learn a lesson. {{10}} you agree with me?

The project {{1}} be finished by Friday. {{2}} there be any delays, we {{3}} have to work late. I {{4}} say we are on track. He {{5}} have sent the files by now. That {{6}} be the email notification. He {{7}} always wait until the last minute. I {{8}} imagine he's very stressed. {{9}} you see him, {{10}} you tell him to relax?

My car {{1}} not start this morning. I {{2}} have checked the battery yesterday. {{3}} I have known, I {{4}} have taken the bus. That {{5}} be the mechanic calling now. He {{6}} have found the problem. I {{7}} say it's going to be expensive. {{8}} you have a spare car, I {{9}} borrow it. {{10}} that be possible?

advanced.title: Advanced Modals: Can, Able To, May, Might
advanced.content:
📌 Can, Could & Be Able To
  • Ability: Can được ưu tiên cho hiện tại, trước câu bị động và kỹ năng.
    The results can be viewed online.
  • Past Specific Action: Dùng was/were able to cho một hành động cụ thể thành công trong quá khứ.
    We were able to finish on time despite the traffic.
  • General vs Specific Possibility: Can cho khả năng chung, Could cho khả năng cụ thể.
    Working from home can be lonely. It could rain later.
  • Impossible: Dùng can't (không dùng couldn't) để nói điều gì đó là không thể.
    He can't be serious!
📌 May & Might
  • Register: May trang trọng hơn, thường dùng trong văn phong học thuật.
    High temperatures may affect performance.
  • May/Might well: Khả năng xảy ra cao hơn.
    It may well take longer than expected.
  • May/Might as well: Gợi ý làm gì đó vì không còn lựa chọn tốt hơn.
    We might as well leave now.
  • Concession: Dùng may để nhượng bộ trước khi đưa ra ý kiến trái ngược.
    He may be rich, but he's not happy.

exercises.q: Despite the heavy rain, we ___ to reach the summit.
exercises.exp: Dùng were able to cho một thành công cụ thể trong quá khứ.

exercises.q: The lights are on; someone ___ be inside.
exercises.exp: Could/May dùng cho khả năng cụ thể.

exercises.q: That ___ be the right answer; it's completely illogical.
exercises.exp: Can't dùng để phủ định sự chắc chắn (không thể nào).

exercises.q: We ___ leave now; there's nothing else to do here.
exercises.opts: might as well,may as well,could as well,both A & B
exercises.exp: May/Might as well dùng cho gợi ý khi không còn lựa chọn tốt hơn.

exercises.q: She ___ speak four languages fluently.
exercises.exp: Can được ưu tiên khi nói về kỹ năng/năng lực.

exercises.q: The proposal ___ be ambitious, but it is achievable.
exercises.exp: May dùng trong cấu trúc nhượng bộ (concession).

exercises.q: You ___ have told me you were coming!
exercises.exp: Might have + V3 dùng để chỉ trích (giống should have).

exercises.q: It ___ well take longer than we initially thought.
exercises.exp: May well nhấn mạnh khả năng cao.

exercises.q: When I was young, I ___ stay up all night.
exercises.exp: Could dùng cho khả năng chung trong quá khứ.

exercises.q: ___ I make a suggestion?
exercises.exp: May là trang trọng nhất cho sự cho phép.

exercises.q: Working night shifts ___ be very exhausting.
exercises.exp: Can dùng cho khả năng chung/đặc trưng.

exercises.q: She ___ have misunderstood the instructions; they were very clear.
exercises.exp: Can't/Couldn't have + V3 cho sự chắc chắn phủ định trong quá khứ.

exercises.q: Although he arrived late, he ___ to join the meeting.
exercises.exp: Was allowed to cho sự cho phép cụ thể trong quá khứ.

exercises.q: It ___ snow later this evening, so stay warm.
exercises.exp: Could/May cho dự đoán tương lai.

exercises.q: I ___ take the afternoon off if I finish this.
exercises.exp: Might phổ biến trong văn nói cho kế hoạch tương lai.

exercises.q: He ___ have forgotten about the appointment.
exercises.exp: Tất cả đều diễn tả khả năng trong quá khứ.

exercises.q: You ___ as well start without him; he's always late.
The results ___ be viewed on our website.
exercises.exp: Can được ưu tiên trước câu bị động.

exercises.q: I ___ hear someone calling my name.
exercises.exp: Could dùng với động từ tri giác trong quá khứ.

exercises.q: This ___ well be our last chance.
Despite the traffic, we ___ (be/able/to) arrive on time.
You ___ (might/have) told me you were leaving!
It ___ (may/well) rain later, so take an umbrella.
We ___ (might/as/well) leave now; the show is over.
He ___ (can/not) be serious about quitting!
When I was a child, I ___ (could) swim very well.
The problem ___ (can) be solved with a bit of effort.
She ___ (may) be smart, but she lacks experience.
We ___ (were/allowed/to) enter the building after showing our IDs.
I ___ (might) go to the cinema tonight.
He ___ (could/not/have) seen me; I was hiding.
Watch this! I ___ (can) do a magic trick.
It ___ (could) be that he's just busy.
Students ___ (could) leave early on Fridays in my old school.
You ___ (might/well) find that it's harder than it looks.
I ___ (can) hear the birds singing outside.
They ___ (may/have) missed the train.
We ___ (may/as/well) start the meeting.
The weather ___ (can) be very unpredictable here.
She ___ (was/able/to) finish the exam just in time.

reorder.words: we were able to finish the task on time
you might have told me you were leaving
it may well take longer than expected now
we might as well leave the party now
he can't be serious about quitting his job
she can speak four different languages fluently now
the results can be viewed on our website
he may be rich but he is unhappy
we were allowed to enter the restricted area
it could rain later this evening so watch
I might take the afternoon off today later
she couldn't have seen me in the dark
we might as well start without him now
it may well be our last chance here
he was able to escape from the building
you might have mentioned the change to me
it can be very cold in the winter
we were allowed to leave early on Friday
she may have forgotten about the meeting today
I can solve this puzzle in a minute

passage.text: Despite the storm, the rescue team {{1}} find the missing hikers. They {{2}} have been lost for days, but luckily they {{3}} survive. The conditions {{4}} be very dangerous in the mountains. You {{5}} as well be prepared for anything. It {{6}} well be that the weather improves tomorrow. However, you {{7}} be too careful. I {{8}} hear the wind howling outside. We {{9}} have brought more supplies. {{10}} I make a suggestion for the next trip?

I {{4}} speak English, but I {{5}} not speak French yet. I {{6}} as well start taking lessons. It {{7}} be that I have a natural talent. I {{8}} have started earlier in my life. The manager {{5}} be happy about it, but he {{6}} understand. We {{7}} to complete the first phase yesterday. That {{8}} have been a success. I {{9}} see the finish line now. {{10}} we succeed in the end?

He {{1}} be the best player, but he {{2}} be very arrogant. You {{3}} as well ignore his comments. He {{4}} well change his attitude later. I {{5}} to beat him in the last game. It {{6}} have been a fluke. I {{7}} hear him complaining now. He {{8}} have lost his temper. You {{9}} be serious if you think he's nice. {{10}} I tell you a secret?

The car {{1}} be repaired by tomorrow. The mechanic {{2}} well find more issues. We {{3}} as well prepare for a high bill. I {{4}} not afford a new car yet. I {{5}} to save some money last year. That {{6}} have been enough. I {{7}} hear a strange noise in the engine. It {{8}} be something serious. You {{9}} be too careful with old cars. {{10}} you give me a lift?

advanced.title: The Subjunctive: Present and Past
advanced.content:
📌 Present Subjunctive
  • Form: Dùng động từ nguyên mẫu (bare infinitive) cho tất cả các ngôi.
    They suggested that he leave early. It is essential that she be informed.
  • Negative: not + base form.
    I insist that you not tell him.
  • Use: Sau các động từ (advise, ask, demand, insist, order, propose, recommend, suggest) và tính từ (crucial, essential, important, vital).
  • British English: Thường dùng should + infinitive thay thế.
    It is vital that he should be there.
📌 Past Subjunctive
  • Form: Dùng thì quá khứ cho các tình huống giả định ở hiện tại. Riêng be dùng were cho tất cả các ngôi.
    I wish she were here. If I were you...
  • Unreal Past: Dùng past perfect cho giả định về quá khứ.
    I wish I had known.
  • Expressions: Dùng sau I wish, If only, would rather, it's time, as if/though.

exercises.q: The manager insisted that everyone ___ the meeting on time.
exercises.exp: Present subjunctive dùng nguyên mẫu không 'to'.

exercises.q: It is vital that the medical supplies ___ delivered immediately.
exercises.exp: Subjunctive của 'be' là 'be' cho tất cả các ngôi.

exercises.q: I wish I ___ more time to finish the project last week.
exercises.exp: Wish + Past perfect cho hối tiếc về quá khứ.

exercises.q: I'd rather you ___ anyone about our secret.
exercises.opts: don't tell,didn't tell,not tell,not to tell
exercises.exp: Would rather + S + Past simple cho giả định hiện tại.

exercises.q: They recommended that the report ___ revised.
If only she ___ here with us right now.
exercises.exp: Past subjunctive 'were' cho giả định hiện tại.

exercises.q: It is essential that he ___ the truth.
The doctor suggested that she ___ a few days off work.
It's high time we ___ for the airport.
I propose that the meeting ___ postponed until next Monday.
She talks as if she ___ the owner of the company.
I insist that he ___ not invited to the party.
I'd sooner you ___ me the money today.
It is important that every member ___ informed of the changes.
I wish you ___ so much noise while I'm working.
exercises.exp: Wish + Past simple cho thói quen hiện tại gây khó chịu.

exercises.q: They asked that the students ___ quiet during the exam.
If I ___ you, I would take the offer.
It is crucial that the project ___ finished on schedule.
He looked as if he ___ all night.
exercises.opts: worked,was working,had been working,has been working

exercises.q: The board requested that he ___ his resignation.
It is essential that she ___ (arrive) on time.
I wish I ___ (know) the answer yesterday.
The teacher suggested that he ___ (study) harder.
If only he ___ (be) here to see this!
I insist that you ___ (not/tell) anyone about this.
It's time we ___ (start) the meeting.
I'd rather you ___ (stay) home tonight.
They recommended that the law ___ (be/change).
She acts as if she ___ (be) the boss.
It is vital that he ___ (be/inform) immediately.
I propose that the committee ___ (meet) tomorrow.
I wish you ___ (not/smoke) in the house.
The doctor ordered that the patient ___ (rest).
It is important that the data ___ (be) accurate.
I'd sooner you ___ (not/go) out tonight.
He spoke as if he ___ (see) the movie before.
It is advisable that he ___ (consult) a lawyer.
I wish I ___ (be) taller.
They requested that the meeting ___ (be/cancel).
If only I ___ (listen) to your advice!

I wish I had known the truth earlier
the manager insisted that he leave the office

I'd rather you didn't tell him the news

I'd rather we {{5}} more time to check everything. It's time the company {{6}} more resources. He speaks as if he {{7}} everything about the project. I propose that we {{8}} a meeting. It is essential that everyone {{9}} present. Be that as it {{10}}, we must finish.

I wish I {{1}} the world. If only I {{2}} more money! I'd rather I {{3}} a millionaire. It's time I {{4}} for a better job. My boss suggests that I {{5}} more training. It is important that I {{6}} my skills. He insists that I {{7}} not late for work. I wish he {{8}} so demanding. It is essential that I {{9}} a balance. Suffice it to {{10}} that I am trying.

The teacher asked that the students {{1}} their homework. It is advisable that they {{2}} every day. I wish they {{3}} more motivated. If only they {{4}} the value of education! I'd rather they {{5}} more time in the library. It's time they {{6}} studying seriously. She talks as if she {{7}} a genius. I propose that we {{8}} them more support. It is crucial that no one {{9}} left behind. Come what {{10}}, they must learn.
